tool_args.label: Bus lanes on Hylan Boulevard

payload.location_text: Hylan Boulevard between Lincoln Avenue and Steuben Street
payload.description: Bus lanes on Hylan Boulevard between Lincoln Avenue and Steuben Street. In effect on weekdays from 6-9am northbound and 3-7pm southbound.

tool_args.label: Bus lanes on Richmond Avenue (Platinum Avenue to Forest Hill Road)

payload.description: Bus lanes on Richmond Avenue between Platinum Avenue and Forest Hill Road. In effect at all times. Located to the left of the curb lane.

tool_args.label: S79 becomes S79 SBS with streamlined service

payload.claim_text: S79 will become S79 SBS and will only stop at SBS stations
payload.description: All S79 service becomes Select Bus Service, stopping only at SBS stations

payload.claim_text: S59 and S78 will continue to serve local stops with added service
payload.description: Local stops will continue to be served by the S59 and S78, with added service

payload.description: SBS fare equals local bus fare

payload.description: Express buses can also use bus lanes

tool_args.label: S79 rerouting - Staten Island Mall-bound

payload.claim_text: SBS goes straight on Richmond Avenue instead of along Forest Hill Road/Yukon Avenue
payload.description: Rerouting of Staten Island Mall-bound S79

tool_args.label: Bus lane fines $115-$150

payload.claim_text: $115 - $150 fine if you drive, park, or stand in an active bus lane.
payload.description: Fine amount for driving, parking, or standing in an active bus lane

tool_args.label: Bus lane enforcement methods

payload.claim_text: NYC enforces bus lanes with: Video cameras, Increased police enforcement
payload.description: NYC enforces bus lanes with video cameras and increased police enforcement
